title: Chanderi Fort
tagline: Chanderi Fort — heritage city of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Chanderi Fort located at Chanderi in Ashoknagar District of Madhya Pradesh state in India is situated at a distance of 127 km from Shivpuri and 37 km from Lalitpur and about 45 km
overview.description: Chanderi Fort located at Chanderi in Ashoknagar District of Madhya Pradesh state in India is situated at a distance of 127 km from Shivpuri and 37 km from Lalitpur and about 45 km from Esagarh and 38 km from Mungoali It is located on a hill southwest of the Betwa River. Chanderi is surrounded by hills, lakes and forests and there are several monuments. Chanderi finds mention in Mahabharata. Shishupal was the king of Mahabharata period.

topPlaces.name: Chanderi
topPlaces.description: Chanderi, is a town of historical importance in Ashoknagar District of the state Madhya Pradesh in India. It is situated at a distance of 127 km from Shivpuri, 38 km from Lalitpur, 57 km from Ashok Nagar, 348 km from Jhansi and 46 km from Isagarh.

topPlaces.name: Shahzadi Ka Roza
topPlaces.description: Shahzadi Ka Rauza, or Shahzadi Ka Roza (literally "princess' tomb") is a tomb located in Chanderi, in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is listed as a monument of national importance.

topPlaces.name: Jama Masjid, Chanderi
topPlaces.description: The Jama Masjid is a Friday mosque in Chanderi, in the Ashoknagar district of the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. The mosque was completed in 853 AH (1449/1450 CE) and is a Monument of National Importance.

topPlaces.name: Battle of Chanderi
topPlaces.description: The Battle of Chanderi or Siege of Chanderi took place in the aftermath of the Battle of Khanwa in which the Mughal Emperor Babur (transliteration: Bābar) had defeated the Rajput Confederacy and firmly establish Mughal rule while crushing regrowing Rajput powers as the battle was fought for supremacy of Northern India between Rajputs and Mughals. On receiving news that Rana Sanga had renewed war preparations to renew the conflict with him, Babur decided to isolate the Rana by inflicting a military defeat on one of his vassals Medini Rai who was the ruler of Malwa.

items.note: Chanderi, is a town of historical importance in Ashoknagar District of the state Madhya Pradesh in India. It is situated at a distance of 127 km from Shivpuri, 38 km from Lalitpur, 57 km from Ashok Nagar, 348 km from Jhansi and 46 km from Isagarh.
Shahzadi Ka Rauza, or Shahzadi Ka Roza (literally "princess' tomb") is a tomb located in Chanderi, in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is listed as a monument of national importance.

The Jama Masjid is a Friday mosque in Chanderi, in the Ashoknagar district of the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. The mosque was completed in 853 AH (1449/1450 CE) and is a Monument of National Importance.

The Battle of Chanderi or Siege of Chanderi took place in the aftermath of the Battle of Khanwa in which the Mughal Emperor Babur (transliteration: Bābar) had defeated the Rajput Confederacy and firmly establish Mughal rule while crushing regrowing Rajput powers as the battle was fought for supremacy of Northern India between Rajputs and Mughals. On receiving news that Rana Sanga had renewed war preparations to renew the conflict with him, Babur decided to isolate the Rana by inflicting a military defeat on one of his vassals Medini Rai who was the ruler of Malwa.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chanderi Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chanderi Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chanderi Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gwalior Airport (175 km) and the nearest railway station is Jhansi Junction (93 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chanderi Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chanderi Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chanderi Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Chanderi Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chanderi Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chanderi, Shahzadi Ka Roza, Jama Masjid, Chanderi, Battle of Chanderi.
